seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sultana Point and Summertown. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sultana Point vs Summertown: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sultana Point and Summertown.
heading: Sultana Point vs Summertown — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sultana Point, South Australia and Summertown, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Summertown has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Sultana Point (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sultana Point or Summertown safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sultana Point has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Summertown scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sultana Point scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Summertown scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sultana Point or Summertown?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Summertown has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
